headline: AI Models Rally Behind SPY Gains as Trump's Iran Ceasefire Boosts Markets
summary: All five AI models unanimously predicted SPY would rise, citing Trump's Iran ceasefire extension and positive pre-market futures. Tesla predictions split sharply with Claude, Gemini, and Grok expecting declines ahead of earnings while GPT-4o remained optimistic. The Marvell-Google chip partnership news created divergent views on semiconductor stocks, with Claude bullish on MRVL but bearish on NVDA.

consensus_picks.note: Rare unanimous agreement across all models on SPY upside, driven by geopolitical de-escalation.
Three models expect Tesla weakness ahead of Q1 earnings, while GPT-4o stands alone predicting gains.
Split view on Nvidia with Claude seeing competitive pressure while others expect AI momentum to continue.
Mixed signals on Apple with Gemini bearish on iPhone concerns while others see broad market lift.

best_call.summary: Highest confidence pick at 78% on Marvell's Google chip partnership news driving 6.9% pre-market surge.

worst_call.summary: Extremely bearish $170 target (55% drop) seems overdone despite legitimate EV competition concerns.
